userStories.title: Replace placeholder PRD with the first real Wishmax build scope
userStories.description: Create the first real product PRD before implementation starts.
acceptanceCriteria: A markdown PRD exists in tasks/ with goals, non-goals, user stories, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and QA requirements.
prd.json is updated to match the PRD.
progress.txt includes any carried-forward product or codebase learnings.
verification: Confirm every story has passes:false before the build starts.
